_comment: Gamedata files this skill regenerates. platform=linux drives libserver.so. Add/remove files here; the skill iterates this list. find_skill routing is resolved dynamically (glob find-* skills for the symbol name) so this stays low-maintenance. tracker_project = matching project in ~/cs2-sig-tracker/reports/<project>/status.json for pre-IDA triage (null = not tracked, always validate in IDA).
tracker_note: Signature validator only. reports/<project>/status.json gives per-sig linux status (ok/broken/ambiguous). OFFSET entries are NOT validated (kind=offset, tally.offset_only) — no byte pattern to scan. Tracker never emits NEW sigs; use it only to pick the worklist, then regen in IDA. Triage is valid only when tracker's manifest matches the build loaded in IDA (check status.json manifest / 'Last updated').

files.note: 47 entries (29 sig + 18 offset). Tracker validates the 29 sigs; 18 offsets are IDA-only (RTTI walk). ~half have find-* skills; NO-SKILL entries self-heal via old-sig relocation only.
5 entries, all signatures, all have find-* skills. Tracker MatchZy status.json is byte-identical source. Grenade *_Create funcs + CCSGameRules_PostCleanUp.
2 entries, both signatures, both have find-* skills. NOT tracked by cs2-sig-tracker — no triage signal, always relocate/validate in IDA. CAttributeList_SetOrAddAttributeValueByName + UpdateItemView.
